ava.welcome: Hi! I'm AVA, your Adaptive Visualization Assistant. Select a project on the map or switch to Projects to begin designing. You can also ask me to show layers or navigate to any address!

settings.title: Settings
settings.cesiumHelp: Free token from ion.cesium.com/tokens — enables true 3D free-orbit campus view. Or set CESIUM_TOKEN in Netlify env vars.
settings.gmapsHelp: Enables Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles (buildings mesh) inside Cesium. Requires Map Tiles API enabled in Google Cloud Console. Or set GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY in Netlify env vars.
settings.geminiHelp: Get a free key at aistudio.google.com

cost.title: Project Cost Estimate
cost.disclaimer: Estimates based on 2024 Mid-Atlantic/SE US unit costs. Quantities derived from site area & design keywords. Engage a licensed landscape architect for project budgeting.
